content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Nifty flat at 24034, but sectoral leadership in Pharma (+2.58%), Auto (+0.65%), Metals (+0.63%) suggests rotation rather than risk-off. India VIX 17.88 elevated. Book is +0.26% on day with 11 CNC positions all in green or near-flat — focus on trailing winners and managing the binary-event risks (HAL Q4 May 14, NEULAND Q4 May 12).",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24350
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Current SL 1030 is already above entry 984, locking in ~4.7% gain. CMP 1044, SL gap ~1.4% (just above 1% trail floor). Target 1110 still 6.3% away. Holding — SL already tight, no need to micro-adjust."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive position, -0.9% with SL 119 (~4% below CMP). Gold near all-time high; Fed rate-cut hopes softening but geopolitical bid intact. Hold for diversification."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1710,
      "new_target": 1800,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op on SL (already at 1710 = entry+0.6%). Actually no change needed — emit HOLD instead.",
      "order_type": "LIMIT"
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 6,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results May 14 (6 trading sessions away — outside 3-session binary window for now, but approaching). Position size 11x4575 = ~Rs 50,325 (~5% of portfolio) — within event-trade size guideline. Current SL 4600 above entry 4575, locking small gain. CMP 4627, SL gap ~0.6% — too tight. Will widen slightly after entry levels mature; for now HOLD. Re-evaluate Friday/Monday and exit or trim before May 14."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960,
      "new_target": 7400,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op — SL already at 6960. Convert to HOLD.",
      "order_type": "LIMIT"
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 832,
      "new_target": 900,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stock +9.59% today on Naval Systems Falta brownfield approval. Currently +0.5% from entry 838 with SL 825. Trail SL up to 832 (just below entry, locking small downside protection). CMP 843, gap ~1.3% — above 1% floor. Target 900 intact (+6.8% from CMP).",
      "order_type": "LIMIT"
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "-0.6% with SL 362 (1.2% below CMP). Q4 strong (PAT +30%, AUM +27%, Morgan Stanley TP 320, Motilal 325). Stock today rallied +5.97% — recovering. Target 388 intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+0.5% with SL 818 (0.8% below CMP — slightly tight but acceptable for defensive FMCG). Q4 beat (revenue +22%, vol +9%); JM TP 875. Hold — let it work toward 855."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+1.2% with SL 1265 (just below CMP 1271, gap 0.6% — tight). Q4 PAT +144% QoQ on tax benefit; merger record date May 16 catalyst. Holding but won't tighten further given gap already minimal."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "-0.5% with SL 2950 (1.9% below CMP 2995). Defence cluster + capital goods. Order book Rs 50K Cr ramp; corvette deal pending. Hold to see if 3050 breakout sustains."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "-0.3% with SL 780 (2.9% below CMP 803). Q4 record EBITDA margin 46.5%; non-MF rev +25%. SL appropriately wide for fresh entry. Target 855 intact (+6.4%)."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1030 already locks +4.7% gain; tightening further risks intraday noise stopout."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge; SL appropriately wide."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1710 = entry+0.6%, locking minimal gain. Promoter 2% stake sale overhang; CMP 1727 fading from intraday high 1750. Watch for break of 1718 day-low."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 result May 14 (6 sessions). Position ~5% of capital — within event-trade size. Re-evaluate Monday for pre-event trim/exit."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 6960 above entry 6900. Q4 already out (PAT +114%); Geojit TP 8500. Let target 7400 work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 832,
      "reasoning": "Trailing SL from 825 to 832 (just below entry, gap 1.3% to CMP 843) on +9.6% breakout day with Falta approval catalyst."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 362 (1.2% below CMP); Q4 strong; analyst TPs 320-325. Let recovery run."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 818 just below entry; Q4 beat, target 855."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1265 already tight; merger May 16 catalyst pending."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 2950 wide enough to absorb intraday volatility on a stretched defence name."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Fresh entry today with appropriate SL width; let thesis develop."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "LAURUSLABS (+1.68% with 2.6x volume, strong Q4, China+1 CDMO theme) — attractive but Healthcare/Pharma sector already under-represented. NEULANDLAB Q4 on May 12 — binary event 4 sessions away, do NOT enter new now. SUMICHEM Q4 pending May, agrochem margin recovery binary — pass. GRSE-TITAGARH-HAL already a 3-name defence/capital-goods cluster (~Rs 1.5L combined ≈ 15% capital) — hard cap reached, no more defence adds today. NIFTYBEES — broad-market deployment makes sense if cash sits idle for another week; not actionable today.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Capital deployed 54% — within soft-target zone. 11 CNC positions all green/near-flat. Cluster checks: Defence (HAL+GRSE+TITAGARH) ~15% — at limit. Financials (PNBHOUSING+ABCAPITAL+CAMS) ~12% — manageable. Chemicals (NAVINFLUOR) single name. Today's discipline focus: NOT stacking new entries on a strong-momentum day with multiple Q4 binaries pending across the watchlist. Win rate 14% over 5 days is concerning — over-trading and premature exits suspected. Today the right answer is patience: let the existing winners (PNBHOUSING, NAVINFLUOR, HAL) work to targets without churning. Note open HFCL MIS BUY @ 133.50 — if not filled by 14:00, will need to cancel before MIS deadline. Realized P&L today INR -5,029 (likely from earlier MIS losses) — no new MIS today; preserve cash and let CNC theses play out."
}
